title: Raccoon Removal in Scarsdale, NY | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Scarsdale, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Licensed experts serving Scarsdale homes. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Scarsdale's beautiful tree-lined streets and stately homes provide ideal habitats for raccoons seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Scarsdale, utilizing humane trapping methods and permanent exclusion solutions. Our licensed technicians protect your property from raccoon damage while ensuring the safety of your family and pets.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife control experience to Scarsdale homeowners, with same-day emergency service available throughout Westchester County. Our team is fully licensed, insured, and trained in humane raccoon removal techniques, offering guaranteed results and thorough cleanup services that restore your home to a safe, sanitary condition.
localContext: Scarsdale's historic Tudor and Colonial-style homes, particularly in areas near the Bronx River Parkway and Hartsdale, are especially vulnerable to raccoon intrusions due to mature trees and wooded lots. The village's spacious properties and well-maintained gardens attract raccoons year-round, making professional wildlife control essential for protecting these valuable estates.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Scarsdale?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Scarsdale typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of animals, entry points requiring exclusion, and extent of damage. A basic single-raccoon removal with minor exclusion work starts around $900, while complex cases involving multiple raccoons, attic cleanup, and extensive repairs can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Scarsdale neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common throughout Scarsdale due to the village's abundant mature trees, wooded areas, and proximity to natural habitats along the Bronx River Reservation. Neighborhoods with older homes featuring accessible attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces are particularly attractive to raccoons seeking den sites, especially during spring breeding season and winter months.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in Scarsdale humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC follows all New York State DEC regulations for humane wildlife removal. We use live traps and exclusion methods that safely remove raccoons without harm, and we never separate mothers from dependent young. Our technicians are licensed and trained in ethical wildlife control practices that comply with Westchester County and Scarsdale village ordinances.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to Scarsdale homes?
faqs.answer: Raccoons can cause significant damage to Scarsdale's historic and high-value homes by tearing insulation, chewing electrical wiring, damaging roof structures, and contaminating attics with droppings and urine. They often rip open soffits, vents, and fascia boards to gain entry, and their waste can pose health risks through parasites and diseases like raccoon roundworm. Prompt professional removal prevents costly structural damage and health hazards.
